value.body: Redefining hospitality on the Costa del Sol — exceptional residences and tailored stays, connecting guests, owners and operations in real time.

editorial.image_alt: Mediterranean villa terrace at sunset on the Costa del Sol
editorial.h2: Private villa management on the Costa del Sol, operated on proprietary software.
editorial.body1: Seda OS is the operating system on which we have built everything else. It connects each villa with those who manage it and those who inhabit it.
editorial.body2: Owners receive a portal with P&L, settlements, pricing and tax compliance in real time. Guests receive a guest app with an AI concierge in five languages — and everything they need is a message away.
editorial.tagline: The hospitality of a hotel, in the privacy of a home.

studio.body: Proprietary software, a local team on the Costa del Sol and the operational discipline of a hotel — for a small portfolio of private villas.

q1.q: How do I request a stay?
q1.a: From the property or Contact form, with your dates, number of guests and the services you want. A SEDA specialist confirms availability and proposes a tailored programme within 24 hours.

q2.q: How do I access the residence?
q2.a: With smart access and self-guided check-in. You will receive detailed instructions in the Guest App and, if you prefer, an in-person welcome from the SEDA team.

q3.q: Can I request a chef, transfer or reservations?
q3.a: Yes. Before arrival we activate your preferences and, during your stay, everything is requested from the Guest App. We coordinate private chef, massages, transfers, reservations and curated local experiences.

q4.q: What happens if something needs attention?
q4.a: A single channel: the Guest App. The operations team receives the request in SEDA OS and coordinates the response immediately. 24/7 assistance in your language.

q5.q: How does SEDA evaluate a property?
q5.a: We carry out an architectural, operational and revenue-potential review. A technical visit, zone market analysis and proposal for positioning within the SEDA collection.

q6.q: How do I see my revenue?
q6.a: From the Owners Portal, in real time: forecast revenue, occupancy, monthly settlements and a per-booking breakdown. Financial reporting that is exportable and auditable.

q7.a: Guest verification, specific insurance, digital inventory, between-stay inspections and care protocols. Your residence is treated as if it were our own.

q1.q: How much does SEDA charge to manage my property?
q1.a: We apply a variable commission on gross revenue, itemised in each monthly settlement in SEDA OS. There is no fixed fee, no onboarding cost and no exit penalty. The exact commission depends on the regime (integrated management, marketing-only or premium concierge) and is agreed in the initial proposal.

q2.q: Who looks after guests, and when?
q2.a: A SEDA team employed locally on the Costa del Sol, available 24/7 through the Guest App. Routine queries are pre-filtered by Ask SEDA (AI concierge) and escalated to a human concierge as context requires. Average response time: under 2 minutes.

q3.q: What about the tax obligations on my property?
q3.a: SEDA OS automates the Modelo 179 declaration (residential letting for tourism) every quarter, connects to SES.Hospedajes and maintains compliance with RD 933/2021. For non-residents (IRNR), our tax team prepares the documentation and supports you through filing.

q4.q: Do I need to be in Spain to begin?
q4.a: No. The entire process (valuation, contract, onboarding, photography, listing and operation) is signed digitally. More than 60% of SEDA owners are non-residents. Contracts are signed with qualified digital identification.

q5.q: Can I use my property whenever I want?
q5.a: Yes. Block the dates in SEDA OS or the Owners Portal. The team prepares the home for your arrival as it would for any other stay, at no additional cost (only housekeeping and replenishment at internal rates).

q6.q: How does SEDA choose which properties to accept?
q6.a: We assess architecture, location, privacy, local operational capacity and fit with the SEDA standard. We do not work with every property. The analysis is confidential and without commitment.

q7.q: What if I want to end the agreement?
q7.a: Sixty days' notice, no penalties. Confirmed bookings are honoured to their departure date. Operational data, professional photography and reviews belong to the owner and are exportable at any time.

final.body: A confidential potential analysis within 48 hours. No commitment. No cost.

h2.line1: Luxury is not in asking for everything.
h2.italic: It is in everything being foreseen.

manifesto.body: SEDA was not created to grow quickly. It was created to define a standard. A Mediterranean hospitality, precise and discreet. A technology that does not ask for the spotlight. A way of managing that protects the asset and the owner's time. An experience where the guest arrives, settles, lives — and everything else simply flows.

i1.t: We are not a traditional agency.
i1.b: We do not live off volume or cross-commissions with platforms.

i2.t: We are not a mass platform.
i2.b: We do not compete with Booking. We are not looking for millions of properties.

i3.b: For premium private residences on the Costa del Sol. Real hospitality, invisible technology, respected property.

p1.b: The best technology is the kind you do not notice. Our own data, automation where it makes sense, a human team where it matters.

p2.b: Real people, minimal presence, complete attention. No cold bots, no empty scripts.

p3.b: Self-guided arrivals and departures. Discreet teams. Data inside proprietary architecture.

p4.b: An experience where nothing is missing and nothing is superfluous.

p5.b: An aesthetic and a rhythm. Linen, stone, shade, warm light, sea.

p6.b: Every detail anticipated. Every movement coordinated. No improvisation.

presence.body: A specific geography. A specific property profile. A single standard.

faq.intro: Resolving objections is part of the SEDA standard. If a question isn't here, speak to a specialist — no forms, no waits.

q1.q: How do I request a stay?
q1.a: From the property or Contact form, with your dates, number of guests and the services you want. A SEDA specialist confirms availability and proposes a tailored programme within 24 hours.

q2.q: Can I request a chef, transfer or reservations?
q2.a: Yes. Before arrival we activate your preferences and, during your stay, everything is requested from the Guest App. We coordinate private chef, massages, transfers, reservations and curated local experiences.

q3.q: How do I access the residence?
q3.a: With smart access and self-guided check-in. You will receive detailed instructions in the Guest App and, if you prefer, an in-person welcome from the SEDA team.

q4.q: What does the Guest App include?
q4.a: Access, property guide, instant concierge, real-time request log, local recommendations and direct communication with SEDA. Available in Spanish, English, German, French and Italian.

q5.q: What happens if something needs attention?
q5.a: A single channel: the Guest App. The operations team receives the request in SEDA OS and coordinates the response immediately. 24/7 assistance in the local language.

q1.q: How does SEDA evaluate a property?
q1.a: We carry out an architectural, operational and revenue-potential review. A technical visit, zone market analysis and proposal for positioning within the SEDA collection.

q2.a: We work with an integrated management model with a commission on gross revenue. The structure is adapted to the property profile and the owner's objective, and is always aligned with results.

q3.q: How do I see my revenue?
q3.a: From the Owners Portal, in real time: forecast revenue, occupancy, monthly settlements and a per-booking breakdown. Financial reporting that is exportable and auditable.

q4.a: The SEDA team, with its own network of certified providers. Scheduled preventive maintenance and reactive work recorded in SEDA OS, with a complete history for the asset.

q5.a: Guest verification, specific insurance, digital inventory, between-stay inspections and care protocols. Your residence is treated as if it were our own.

q6.a: All automated from the moment the villa is set up in SEDA OS. Your tax adviser receives reconciled data, exportable in whichever format they request.

villa.not_found_title: Villa not found — SEDA Private Homes
villa.meta_suffix: Private villa managed by SEDA Private Homes on the Costa del Sol.

villa-alboran.description: A contemporary residence with an infinity pool and open Mediterranean views, in Marbella. Long-lined architecture that favours light, the centuries-old olive trees in the garden, and the sea as a permanent horizon.

atico-marina-puerto-banus.description: A penthouse with panoramic views over Puerto Banús — wrap-around terrace, contemporary materials and the discreet closeness of the marina. For urban stays without giving up the sea.

finca-los-olivos-casares.description: An Andalusian finca among centuries-old olive trees in the hills of Casares — private spa, inner patio with a lemon tree, and the stillness of the sierra. For longer gatherings, families or groups seeking retreat.

residencia-duna-estepona.description: A beachfront residence in Estepona — cascading terraces, direct access to the sand and minimalist architecture that lets the horizon take the lead. The closest stay to the sea in the collection.
